# PERF-150 positive: large stack frame from multiple big local buffers
lang: go
file: PERF-150-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
)

func LargeFrameHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	var dataBuf [4096]byte
	var tmpBuf [8192]byte
	dataBuf[0] = 'a'
	tmpBuf[0] = 'b'
	w.Write(dataBuf[:])
}
